channel.title: Games, Toys and Collectibles for Big Children on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Games, Toys and Collectibles for Big Children on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO 76421 Harry Potter Dobby the House-Elf Set Movable Iconic Figure Model Toy or Bedroom Accessory Decoration Character Collection Gift for Girls Boys Teens and All Fans Aged 8+
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 76421 Harry Potter Dobby the House-Elf Set Movable Iconic Figure Model Toy or Bedroom Accessory Decoration Character Collection Gift for Girls Boys Teens and All Fans Aged 8+ at the following link: ℹ️: The Dobby the House-Elf figure has a posable head, ears, arms and fingers so kids can change his look and he can hold the brick-built accessories The Dobby figure comes with a brick-built stand with a nameplate so he can be displayed as a Harry Potter bedroom accessory or decoration Includes fun Harry Potter accessories including Aunt Petunia’s ‘floating’ pudding cake and a model of Tom Riddle’s diary with Harry Potter’s sock This LEGO Dobby the House-Elf figure is a magical Harry Potter gift for girls, boys, all kids aged 8+ and collectors of Harry Potter memorabilia The first LEGO Harry Potter buildable model of Dobby the House-Elf - fans can build one the most beloved characters in the Wizarding World!

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions 2 Fast 2 Furious Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 Race Car Toy Model Building Kit Collectible with Racer Minifigure 2023 Set for Kids 76917
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Speed Champions 2 Fast 2 Furious Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 Race Car Toy Model Building Kit Collectible with Racer Minifigure 2023 Set for Kids 76917 at the following link: ℹ️: Fast and Furious fans can relive thrilling moments from the 2 Fast 2 Furious movie with this LEGO Nissan Skyline GT-R (R34) model car building kit This ultra-sleek LEGO Speed Champions 2023 set includes a Brian O’Conner minifigure for kids to place behind the wheel of the race car model Car lovers can experience a rewarding build before proudly displaying this collectible toy car or recreating epic racing scenes from the movie Inspired by the real-life version, the toy race car model features iconic stripes on the side, a wing at the back and a grille on the front LEGO Speed Champions and Fast and Furious fans will appreciate the impressive wheel arches and the nitro fuel canister on the passenger seat 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Marvel I am Groot Buildable Toy Guardians of the Galaxy 2 Set Featuring a Collectable Baby Groot Model Figure Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls and Avengers Fans 76217
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Marvel I am Groot Buildable Toy Guardians of the Galaxy 2 Set Featuring a Collectable Baby Groot Model Figure Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls and Avengers Fans 76217 at the following link: ℹ️: Passionate fans can place the cute Marvel character in a pose, can dance with him to the rhythm of the music and recreate his funny movements The fully jointed Groot buildable toy is easy to position and comes with a pretend cassette to recreate the famous Baby Groot dancing scene The set comes with printed instructions, plus kids can use a digital version in the LEGO Building Instructions app to zoom and rotate while building the posable Avengers model This set is a great Marvel-themed birthday or Christmas gift idea for kids, boys and girls aged 10+ years old who are fans of the Marvel universe and love Avengers buildable toys With this LEGO Marvel building toy, kids can build a highly posable Baby Groot model figure, from the Marvel Studios Guardians of the Galaxy Vol.

item.title: LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Set for Adults to Build Scale Race Car Model Building Kit Collectible Home or Office Décor Father s Day Treat Gifts for men Women Him or Her 42171
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Set for Adults to Build Scale Race Car Model Building Kit Collectible Home or Office Décor Father s Day Treat Gifts for men Women Him or Her 42171 here: ℹ️: A racing car gift project for adults – This model car kit makes a rewarding Fathers Day gift for dad, birthday present for men and women, or as a just-because treat for adult fans of motorsport who enjoy challenging projects Test the steering – Features include slick tyres, plus steering that can be controlled using the steering wheel or the knob on top of the model car Display piece – With authentic livery details, this LEGO set for adults can be admired from every angle, and makes a great home or office décor piece Mercedes F1 model car – This LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance model kit for adults to build is packed with authentic details 3D building instructions – The LEGO Builder app lets you save sets, track your progress, zoom in and rotate your model car in 3D Authentic features – Includes the differential and 6-cylinder engine with moving pistons, plus an opening wing inspired by the real-world car’s DRS 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Technic NEOM McLaren Extreme E Race Car Toy For Kids Boys & Girls Aged 7+ Years Old who Love Model Cars Off-Road Pull-Back Racing Vehicle Set Birthday Gift Idea 42166
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic NEOM McLaren Extreme E Race Car Toy For Kids Boys & Girls Aged 7+ Years Old who Love Model Cars Off-Road Pull-Back Racing Vehicle Set Birthday Gift Idea 42166 at the following link: ℹ️: An introduction to engineering – LEGO Technic sets feature realistic movement and mechanisms that introduce young kids to the world of engineering Chunky tyres – The toy car model features authentic details inspired by the real racing car, including off-road tyres and partner logos Toy racing car – Kids send their LEGO Technic model speeding along using the pull-back action as they imagine racing like a real Extreme E driver Pull-back car – Give kids a fun building project with the NEOM McLaren Extreme E Race Car toy for 7+ year old boys and girls, with pull-back action A car gift for kids – This set makes a fun birthday gift for 7 plus year old boys, girls and kids who love LEGO vehicles and model cars 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Chewbacca Set Collectible Wookiee Figure with Bowcaster and Minifigure Return of the Jedi 40th Anniversary Model Kit for Adults Father s Day Treat Gift for Men & Women 75371
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars Chewbacca Set Collectible Wookiee Figure with Bowcaster and Minifigure Return of the Jedi 40th Anniversary Model Kit for Adults Father s Day Treat Gift for Men & Women 75371 here: ℹ️: Channel your creative Force with this LEGO Star Wars model: recreate the famous Wookies hairy body in LEGO style, with bandolier and giant bowcaster Build this cool LEGO Star Wars set for adults and display the 46 cm tall Star Wars figure in his iconic action pose as a home or office decoration Celebrate 40 years of Star Wars: Return of the Jedi and the heroic Wookiee with this detailed 2,319 piece LEGO Star Wars Chewbacca figure for adults The Chewbacca LEGO Star Wars figure includes a brick-built bowcaster, a bandolier, a built-in display stand and and informative character plaque Number of Pieces: 2,319 This LEGO Star Wars collectible model building kit for adults and teens includes a Chewbacca LEGO Star Wars minifigure with a stud-shooting bowcaster Collectible LEGO Star Wars sets for adults are designed for you, the discerning hobbyist who enjoys mindful, creative projects to relax, plus they make great Star Wars-themed Fathers Day gifts for dad 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars TIE Bomber Model Building Kit Starfighter with Gonk Droid Figure & Darth Vader Minifgure with a Lightsaber Collectable Gift Idea 75347
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars TIE Bomber Model Building Kit Starfighter with Gonk Droid Figure & Darth Vader Minifgure with a Lightsaber Collectable Gift Idea 75347 at the following link: ℹ️: Kids can use the cart to transport torpedoes to the model TIE Bomber; the cart has space for a minifigure and can load 2 torpedoes in the back Fans can recreate thrilling Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back scenes with this TIE Star Wars Bomber Starfighter buildable model and 3 minifigures Includes LEGO Star Wars minifigures: Darth Vader with a lightsaber, Vice Admiral Sloane and a TIE Bomber Pilot plus a Gonk Droid LEGO figure This Star Wars model building kit for boys and girls aged 9 and up makes a cool birthday gift for the Star Wars collectable toy vehicles fans The Star Wars buildable toy has openable cockpit and warhead bay with torpedo-dropping function for 4 torpedoes (6 are included) and 2 stud shooters The LEGO Builder app provides children with digital tools that guide them through a unique and fun building experience on their tablet or smartphone 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 31137 Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 31137 Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers at the following link: ℹ️: Young animal lovers will love building characterful canines: beagle, poodle and labrador dog figures and role-playing caring for the toy pets The toy pets can also be transformed into a miniature schnauzer and a pug, or a husky and a long-haired dachshund for hours of creative play For unlimited creative fun, let the little ones discover other LEGO Creator 3 in 1 sets: Vintage Motorbike (31135) and Exotic Parrot (31136) Each group of dogs also come with accessories such as a bowl, rubber bone, ball, hairbrush, toy rabbit or dog-walking lead to add extra fun All of the toy dogs from the 3 different groups have posable heads, tails and ears and can fold their legs and paws to sit or stretch out A great treat for dog lovers and a fab gift for animal-loving kids aged 7+ years old to play with or to create fun displays in their bedrooms Kids can create 3 different groups of dogs with this LEGO Creator 3in1 Adorable Dogs toy building set, featuring animal figures from 7 cute breeds 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon UCS Set for Adults Model Kit to Build with Han Solo Princess Leia & Chewbacca Minifigures Plus Droid Figure Collectible Gifts for Teenagers Boys and Girls 75192
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon UCS Set for Adults Model Kit to Build with Han Solo Princess Leia & Chewbacca Minifigures Plus Droid Figure Collectible Gifts for Teenagers Boys and Girls 75192 here: ℹ️: Classic crew weapons include Han’s blaster pistol and Chewbacca’s stud-firing bowcaster; episode VII/VIII crew weapons include Rey’s small silver blaster and Finn’s medium blaster rifle Number of Pieces: 7,541 Exterior features include removable hull panels, a lowering boarding ramp, concealed blaster cannon, a 4-minifigure cockpit with a detachable canopy, interchangeable sensor dishes, upper and lower quad laser cannons and 7 landing legs Fans of the Galaxy far, far away can build and display the ultimate LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon model with this LEGO Star Wars 7,541 piece set, featuring loads of iconic details, plus crew members from the original and sequel Star Wars trilogies The LEGO Star Wars UCS model kit features a main hold features a seating area, Dejarik holographic game, a combat remote training helmet, an engineering station with a turning minifigure seat and a doorway build with passageway decoration The gunnery station on this collectible set features a minifigure gunner’s seat and a detachable hull panel with a fully rotating quad laser cannon; an additional quad laser cannon is also mounted on the underside The Millennium Falcon Star Wars model also Includes 4 classic crew minifigures: Han Solo, Chewbacca, Princess Leia and C-3PO, plus 3 Episode VII/VIII crew minifigures: Older Han Solo, Rey and Finn and a BB-8 Star Wars droid figure A great set for LEGO collectors and Star Wars fans alike; this Millennium Falcon model makes a great Star Wars-themed Fathers Day gift, his or hers birthday present, anniversary surprise for husband or wife, or a special treat for yourself 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Indiana Jones Temple of the Golden Idol Model Kit for Adults to Build Raiders of the Lost Ark Movie Set with Interactive Functions and Minifigures 77015
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Indiana Jones Temple of the Golden Idol Model Kit for Adults to Build Raiders of the Lost Ark Movie Set with Interactive Functions and Minifigures 77015 at the following link: ℹ️: Dive into classic Raiders of the Lost Ark adventures with the included LEGO Indiana Jones, Satipo, Belloq and a Hovitos Warrior minifigures This model kit for adults to build has four knobs to activate different functions to lower and illuminate the idol and to collapse a wall The functions of the model building kit also allow Indiana Jones to swing on a vine in the cave and to see Indy being chased by a massive boulder Number of Pieces: 1,545 A set that will delight all adult LEGO collectors; also check out other LEGO Indiana Jones sets like Escape from the Lost Tomb (77013) Pay tribute to Indiana Jones with the LEGO Temple of the Golden Idol set for adults, featuring the opening scene from Raiders of the Lost Ark A great nostalgic gift idea for adult Indiana Jones movie fans with a passion for LEGO constructions and rewarding building challenges 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle Model Big Collectable Set with the Great Hall Sword of Gryffindor & Chamber of Secrets Wizarding World Gift Idea for Fans 71043
item.description: You can find LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle Model Big Collectable Set with the Great Hall Sword of Gryffindor & Chamber of Secrets Wizarding World Gift Idea for Fans 71043 with a discount here: ℹ️: Accessory elements include the Sword of Gryffindor, Helga Hufflepuff´s cup, wands, potions, house banners, flames, a cauldron and 2 magnifying glasses. Hagrid’s hut has Aragog the spider and buildable pumpkins Number of Pieces: 6,020 Buildable microscale model of Hogwarts Castle, hut of Hagrid, Whomping Willow tree and 5 boats Hogwarts Castle features the Great Hall with buildable ‘stained glass windows, house banners, benches, tables, flaming torches and moving staircases This toy is one of a series of detailed modular sets that can be built, combined and rearranged to create kids own Hogwarts Castle model, and makes a great Harry Potter-themed Birthday gift for kids aged 9+, or a fun Fathers Day gift The Whomping Willow includes the buildable blue Flying Ford Anglia car in its spinning branches 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Disney Princess Cinderella and Prince Charming s Castle Doll House Buildable Toy with 3 Mini Dolls plus Gus Gus and Lucifer Figures Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 5 Plus Years Old 43206
item.description: You can find LEGO Disney Princess Cinderella and Prince Charming s Castle Doll House Buildable Toy with 3 Mini Dolls plus Gus Gus and Lucifer Figures Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 5 Plus Years Old 43206 with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO ǀ Disney Princess Castle buildable toy set for kids aged 5+ includes a 3-level castle dollhouse with ballroom and dress studio, plus 3 mini-doll figures Young kids aged 5+ years old will love this feature-packed castle where they can play out scenes from the movies or create their own stories Features Cinderella mini-doll figure with extra ball gown outfit, Prince Charming and Lady Tremaine, plus Gus Gus and Lucifer LEGO animal figures Theres a ballroom with spinning floor so Cinderella and the Prince can dance, dress studio, closet with a cat door, bedroom, kitchen and more This buildable toy is a great birthday, Christmas or any time gift for kids, girls and boys and fans of Disney Princesses, plus it looks great on display in kids rooms 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 75369 Star Wars Boba Fett Mech Buildable Action Figure Toy with Stud-Shooting Blaster and Jetpack with Flick Shooter Collectible Set for Kids
item.description: You can find LEGO 75369 Star Wars Boba Fett Mech Buildable Action Figure Toy with Stud-Shooting Blaster and Jetpack with Flick Shooter Collectible Set for Kids with a discount here: ℹ️: LEG75369 5702017462837 🛒 Buy it!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Rambi the Rhino Expansion Set Buildable Animal Toy Figure Small Gift to Combine with a Starter Course Game 71420
item.description: You can find LEGO Super Mario Rambi the Rhino Expansion Set Buildable Animal Toy Figure Small Gift to Combine with a Starter Course Game 71420 with a discount here: ℹ️: Kids smash the rhino to trigger digital reaction with LEGO Super Mario figures; Starter Course 71360, 71387 or 71403 is required for interactive play The rock elements can be stacked; kids can ride the rhino toy with LEGO Super Mario characters to hit the rocks and reveal a hidden banana element LEGO Super Mario expansion packs allow fans to expand, rebuild and customise their levels for extended play and fun collecting coins LEGO Super Mario Rambi the Rhino Set features a toy animal figure for play with LEGO Super Mario Starter Course characters (figures not included) Digital instructions are included in the LEGO Super Mario App with lots of creative ideas for kids to use with their Super Mario toy levels A great expansion set for kids to expand their LEGO Super Mario building toy world; a fun birthday gift to delight kids, boys and girls aged 7+ 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Avatar Ilu Discovery The Way of Water Movie Building Toy Ocean Set Animal-Like Underwater Creature Figure Collectible Display Idea for Kids and Movie Fans 75575
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Avatar Ilu Discovery The Way of Water Movie Building Toy Ocean Set Animal-Like Underwater Creature Figure Collectible Display Idea for Kids and Movie Fans 75575 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO collectible Avatar building toy set makes a fab birthday gift idea for Avatar movie fans and kids who like cool LEGO underwater toys This LEGO Avatar building toy features a posable Ilu animal-like figure with patterned wings, a coral-reef setting and 2 LEGO minifigures The Pandora Ilu animal-like figure features a saddle on its back, large wings and can connect to one of the Navi minifigures using the Na’vi kuru Kids can enjoy imaginative play or pose the characters using the coral settings display stand to create a stunning kids room decoration piece Includes Tsireya and Tuk LEGO Avatar minifigures, an underwater toy spear and 2 toy alien fish - perfect for kids to go on exciting adventures Fans of Avatar and the Avatar: The Way of Water movie can collect all LEGO Avatar sets to create a unique version of the moon of Pandora 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Technic 2022 Ford GT Car Model Kit for Adults to Build 1:12 Scale Supercar with Authentic Features Advanced Collectible Set Father s Day Treat Gift for Men & Women 42154
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic 2022 Ford GT Car Model Kit for Adults to Build 1:12 Scale Supercar with Authentic Features Advanced Collectible Set Father s Day Treat Gift for Men & Women 42154 here: ℹ️: This LEGO supercar model is designed for adult builders, offering a detailed building project, plus it makes a great Fathers Day gift and a fab addition to any LEGO collection Enjoy a rewarding building experience shaping every detail of the 2022 Ford GT with this 1:12 scale LEGO Technic car model kit for adults The model car includes authentic features, such as a V6 engine with moving pistons, independent suspension on all wheels and front-axle steering Number of Pieces: 1,466 Take your time assembling details like the rear-wheel drive with differential, opening doors, adjustable spoiler wing and opening bonnet Part of an innovative collection of LEGO model car kits for adults to build, this set includes the LEGO Builder app with digital instructions With its classic dark blue finish with white racing stripes, this LEGO Technic model car kit for adults makes a stunning display piece 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Technic Airbus H175 Rescue Helicopter Educational Model Building Set for Kids with Spinning Rotors and Motorised Features Construction Toy 42145
item.description: You can find LEGO Technic Airbus H175 Rescue Helicopter Educational Model Building Set for Kids with Spinning Rotors and Motorised Features Construction Toy 42145 with a discount here: ℹ️: This construction toys manual functions also include opening front and rear cowlings to explore the steering mechanism LEGO Technic educational building sets feature realistic movement and mechanisms that introduce young LEGO builders to the world of engineering Motorised features include the spin rotor and tail, slow and fast rotor speeds, retractable landing gear, hoist and spinning replica engine This battery powered toy helicopter requires an AA battery (not-included), the set also includes 1 x motor Model helicopter kits manual functions: the swash plate to control the pitch of the rotor blades, a cockpit door and sliding passenger doors Construction toy features a search and rescue helicopter with motorised and manual functions to help curious kids learn how a helicopter works 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 71407 Super Mario Cat Peach Suit and Frozen Tower Expansion Set Buildable Game with Castle Toy and Costume plus Kamek & Toad Figures Collectible Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys
item.description: You can find LEGO 71407 Super Mario Cat Peach Suit and Frozen Tower Expansion Set Buildable Game with Castle Toy and Costume plus Kamek & Toad Figures Collectible Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys with a discount here: ℹ️: Makes a great Super Mario-themed birthday, or any time gift for kids aged 7+ who own one of the LEGO Super Mario Starter Courses which is needed for play Find instructions and ideas on the LEGO Super Mario companion app; for a list of compatible Android and iOS devices, visit LEGO.

item.title: LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Amy s Animal Rescue Island Playset Buildable Toy with 6 Characters including Amy & Tails Figures Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 7 Plus Years Old 76992
item.description: You can find LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Amy s Animal Rescue Island Playset Buildable Toy with 6 Characters including Amy & Tails Figures Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 7 Plus Years Old 76992 with a discount here: ℹ️: With 2 ways to play - kids can set traps to outwit Badnik, then enjoy animal care role-play as they help Amy and Tails look after the animals This LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog toy set makes a fun birthday gift or any-other-day toy treat for kids, boys and girls aged 7 plus years old who love Sonic, gaming toys and animals Kids can download the LEGO Builder app that guides them on an intuitive building adventure with tools to zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Amy’s Animal Rescue Island toy set for kids aged 7+ features an activity-packed island with 6 characters and loads of fun!

item.title: LEGO DC Batwing: Batman vs. The Joker Set Iconic Aeroplane Toy from 1989 Film with 2 Minifigures Classic Super Hero Playset Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls 76265

item.title: LEGO Marvel Black Widow & Captain America Motorcycles Avengers Age of Ultron Set with 2 Superhero Motorbike Toys for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 and Up 76260
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Marvel Black Widow & Captain America Motorcycles Avengers Age of Ultron Set with 2 Superhero Motorbike Toys for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 and Up 76260 at the following link: ℹ️: Both motorbike toys are equipped with side-shooters to fend off bad guys, plus the super hero minifigures can be easily removed from the bikes Young superheroes will love recreating high speed action from Marvel Studios Avengers: Age of Ultron or coming up with their own adventures This collectible LEGO Marvel buildable toy is a great birthday Avengers gift for 6+ year old kids, boys, girls and all young superheroes LEGO Marvel Black Widow & Captain America Motorcycles building toy brings to life a classic scene from Marvel Studios Avengers: Age of Ultron The buildable Avengers toy playset includes Captain America and Black Widow minifigures with their shield and baton, plus 2 buildable toy motorbikes 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Harry Potter building toy for kids aged 9+ features a Hogwarts castle Astronomy Tower model, 8 minifigures and loads of magical fun Great for role play; kids can search the sky with the telescope, check the mandrakes in the greenhouse, chill in the Ravenclaw dorm or join Slughorns party This LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle buildable toy makes a magical birthday gift for a son or daughter, or a surprise toy treat or boys and girls aged 9+, and all kids who love the Wizarding World adventures Kids can build the multi-level LEGO Hogwarts Castle Astronomy Tower and explore all it has to offer while recreating scenes from the Harry Potter movies Includes LEGO Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Ron Weasley, Luna Lovegood, Neville Longbottom, Draco Malfoy, Lavender Brown and Professor Slughorn minifgures Also includes a toy Hedwig the owl figure, plus accessories like letters, wands, book of potions, broomstick, cakes, wine glasses, lanterns, torches and candles 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian N-1 Starfighter Microfighter Microscale Building Toy The Book of Boba Fett Vehicle with Grogu Baby Yoda Figure Gifts for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 Plus 75363
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian N-1 Starfighter Microfighter Microscale Building Toy The Book of Boba Fett Vehicle with Grogu Baby Yoda Figure Gifts for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 Plus 75363 here: ℹ️: Kids aged 6+ can build a microscale LEGO model of The Mandalorian’s N-1 Starfighter first seen in Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett and 2 characters Kids join The Mandalorian and Grogu for a galaxy of action-packed fun on a bounty-hunting mission in the N-1 Starfighter Microfighter The Star Wars Starfighter features an open cockpit for The Mandalorian, space for Grogu behind the cockpit and 2 stud shooters for action play LEGO Star Wars sets let creative kids and adult fans recreate Star Wars scenes, make up their own stories or display the buildable models; they also make great Star Wars-themed gifts for kids, boys, girls and adult fans alike Includes 2 Star Wars characters: a LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian minifigure, plus a LEGO figure of Grogu (affectionately known as baby Yoda) This LEGO Star Wars playset combines with other LEGO Star Wars Microfighter sets (sold separately) for even more fun play possibilities 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Captain America s Shield Set Avengers Model Building Kit for Adults with Minifigure Nameplate and Thor s Hammer Collectible Infinity Saga Gift Idea for Men Women Him Her 76262
item.description: You can find LEGO Marvel Captain America s Shield Set Avengers Model Building Kit for Adults with Minifigure Nameplate and Thor s Hammer Collectible Infinity Saga Gift Idea for Men Women Him Her 76262 with a discount here: ℹ️: This large LEGO set for Avengers: Infinity Saga fans includes a Captain America minifigure with its own shield and Thor’s hammer Mjölnir For added convenience, a digital version of the Marvel collectible set’s building instructions can be found on the LEGO Builder app This hands-on Marvel model kit for adults to build makes a great gift for any LEGO lover or model-maker, as a birthday present for him or her, anniversary gift for husband or wife or as rewarding treat for yourself Marvel Avengers fans can build the ultimate emblem of good vs evil with this LEGO Marvel Captain Americas Shield; a 3,128 piece LEGO set for adults The Marvel collectible model building kit features Captain Americas red, white and blue shield, with a protruding star and a stand with nameplate Number of Pieces: 3,128 The iconic Avengers shield will make a fantastic addition to any LEGO Marvel collection, and will look great on display as a home or office decor 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Captain America Construction Figure Buildable Toy with Shield Avengers Collection Play and Display Superhero Bedroom Accessory Birthday Gift for Kids Boys Girls Aged 8+ 76258
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Marvel Captain America Construction Figure Buildable Toy with Shield Avengers Collection Play and Display Superhero Bedroom Accessory Birthday Gift for Kids Boys Girls Aged 8+ 76258 here: ℹ️: Great for group play; kids can collect other LEGO Marvel collectible action figures in the series, including Wolverine (76257) With this LEGO Marvel buildable toy, kids can position and pose the Captain America Avengers figure as they recreate missions from the movies The Avengers figure features movable shoulder, arm, hip and leg joints and includes Captain Americas shield, which attaches to his hands or back Put the iconic leader of The Avengers into the hands of kids aged 8+ with this posable LEGO Marvel Captain America action figure building toy Young superheroes can download the LEGO Builder app for an immersive building experience, with digital tools to enhance the building experience 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 41811 DOTS Hogwarts Desktop Kit DIY Harry Potter Back to School Accessories and Supplies Desk Decor Items and Patch Sticker Crafts Toys for Kids
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 41811 DOTS Hogwarts Desktop Kit DIY Harry Potter Back to School Accessories and Supplies Desk Decor Items and Patch Sticker Crafts Toys for Kids at the following link: ℹ️: This Harry Potter toy craft set includes a Golden Snitch note holder, scarf-shaped tray plus a customisable photo frame with decorative add-ons Harry Potter fans can find fun ways to show off their Hogwarts house pride and keep their desk tidy with this back-to-school supplies set Kids can use the different coloured tiles to decorate the pieces, plus there are 10 exclusive mosaic tiles with Harry Potter-inspired designs Also includes a lockable secret box which kids can use to store their treasures, plus an 8x8 adhesive sticker to add fun and colour to any desk LEGO DOTS Hogwarts desktop kit features 4 desk decor items plus an adhesive patch for kids to decorate and bring the magic of Harry Potter to life 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 31129 Creator 3 in 1 Majestic Tiger to Panda or Koi Fish Set Animal Figures Collectible Building Toy Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 9 Plus Years Old
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 31129 Creator 3 in 1 Majestic Tiger to Panda or Koi Fish Set Animal Figures Collectible Building Toy Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 9 Plus Years Old here: ℹ️: This LEGO Creator 3 in 1 animal toy set with its majestic tiger figure makes an inspiring birthday gift for kids, boys and girls The koi fish buildable toy figure has a posable body, flippers and tail for underwater fun This LEGO Creator 3 in 1 set features 3 animal toys for kids to build: tiger toy, red panda and koi fish moels accompanied by a smaller model Details include the tiger with a red bird and jungle display, the red panda with a bonsai tree and bamboo and koi fish with water lilies Kids can choose their all-action stories with 3 LEGO Creator animal toys or fire up their imagination and create a new animal with the bricks The posable tiger toy can move its body, head, jaw, tail, legs and shoulders & the red toy panda can move its head, tail, legs, feet and ears 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Creator 3in1 set, featuring a pirate ship toy, makes a great birthday gift for a son or daughter, or Christmas present for swashbuckling kids, boys and girls aged 9+ years old This LEGO Creator set for aspiring pirates features 3 models in 1: a classic Pirate Ship toy, rustic Pirates’ Inn and mysterious Skull Island On the spooky island, a handle allows kids to open and close the skull, or they can hide the gold in the Pirate Inn’s secret hidey-hole Includes 2 pirate minifigures in full costume with sabres, 1 deckhand sailor plus buildable shark and bird figures and a skeleton figure The pirate ship toy features an opening roof and wall to access the cabin, a foretop to keep watch for targets and rotating cannons for more fun Accessories include a map, torch, pistol, treasure chest, telescope, goblets, 2 sabres and many more details, like flags, barrels and lanterns 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Peach’s Castle Expansion Set Buildable Game Toys Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 8 Plus with Time Block and Figures to Combine with Starter Course 71408
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Super Mario Peach’s Castle Expansion Set Buildable Game Toys Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 8 Plus with Time Block and Figures to Combine with Starter Course 71408 at the following link: ℹ️: Kids help LEGO Mario, LEGO Luigi or LEGO Peach (figures not included) activate the slider platform to spin the wall and reveal Bowser This modular set - compatible with other LEGO Super Mario sets - requires a LEGO Super Mario starter course (71360, 71387 or 71403) for interactive play Also includes a Special Pipe: Peachs Castle, broken bridge and 5 LEGO Super Mario figures – Bowser, Ludwig, Toadette, a Goomba and a Bob-omb The LEGO Super Mario companion app offers instructions and more ideas: visit LEGO.

item.title: LEGO Technic THE BATMAN – BATCYCLE Set Collectible Toy Motorbike Scale Model Building Kit of the Iconic Super Hero Bike from 2022 Movie 42155
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic THE BATMAN – BATCYCLE Set Collectible Toy Motorbike Scale Model Building Kit of the Iconic Super Hero Bike from 2022 Movie 42155 at the following link: ℹ️: Kids and fans can capture the spirit of the DC superhero and build the toy motorbike piece by piece then recreate their favourite Batman moments This collectible LEGO THE BATMAN - BATCYCLE features a supporting kickstand so kids can display their build with pride on a shelf or desk Fans can recreate an iconic vehicle with this LEGO Technic BATCYCLE toy motorbike model building kit, as seen in the 2022 movie: THE BATMAN This motorbike model building kit makes a great Batman gift idea for kids aged 9+ and fans of super heroes, toy vehicles and comic book culture The Batman Bike is packed with realistic features including steering, suspension and a drive chain that connects the H4 engine to the rear wheel 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 41964 DOTS Disney Mickey & Minnie Mouse Back-to-School Project Box 6in1 Toy Crafts Set with Bag Tags Sticker Patch and Desk Tidy Gifts for Kids Aged 6 Plus
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 41964 DOTS Disney Mickey & Minnie Mouse Back-to-School Project Box 6in1 Toy Crafts Set with Bag Tags Sticker Patch and Desk Tidy Gifts for Kids Aged 6 Plus here: ℹ️: LEGO DOTS ǀ Disney Mickey & Minnie Mouse Back-to-School Project Box makes a unique craft set gift for 6 plus year old girls and boys All items from this 6in1 set can be redesigned for endless fun and kids can also use any of the LEGO DOTS Extra DOTS tile kits (sold separately) This 6in1 Back to School Supplies Crafts set features a 2-drawer chest desk tidy, picture frame, note holder, 2 bag tags and a sticker patch The 2-drawer chest desk tidy features fun Mickey ears on top plus room for trinkets and the note holder has a secret space inside The DIY creative set allows to express unique style thanks to lots of coloured tiles and 10 exclusive Disney’s Mickey and Minnie-decorated tiles The 2 bag tags can be personalised and attached to any school bag or backpack; the adhesive sticker can be designed and attached to a notebook 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Sanctum Sanctorum 3-Storey Modular Building Set with Doctor Strange and Iron Man Minifigures Infinity Saga Collectible 76218
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Marvel Sanctum Sanctorum 3-Storey Modular Building Set with Doctor Strange and Iron Man Minifigures Infinity Saga Collectible 76218 here: ℹ️: This LEGO model of Doctor Stranges residence features a 3-storey modular building with 4 facades, lots of movie details and 9 minifigures Fans can recreate and celebrate classic scenes from Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Infinity War and Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness The ground floor features traditional staircase, medical degree and a green armchair; many of the models walls can be reconfigured With LEGO Marvel Doctor Strange, Wong, Iron Man, Spider-Man, Black Maw, Master Mordo, Sinister Strange, Dead Strange, Scarlet Witch minifigures The middle floor library has 2 chairs, a lamp and a hidden portal; the 3 dimension tiles can be changed using the levers on the back of the house Number of Pieces: 2,708 The top floor houses the museum of mystical collections with Cloak of Levitation, a chest, spear, 2 axes and a shield, plus other magical items This LEGO Marvel collectible model recreates the movie magic and makes a great home decor piece with elements to pose the minifigures 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Shuri s Sunbird 76211 Building Kit; Black Panther Airship Construction Toy for Fans of Wakanda Action and Fun Vehicles; Birthday Gift for Super-Hero Kids Aged 8 and up 355 Pieces
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Marvel Shuri s Sunbird 76211 Building Kit; Black Panther Airship Construction Toy for Fans of Wakanda Action and Fun Vehicles; Birthday Gift for Super-Hero Kids Aged 8 and up 355 Pieces at the following link: ℹ️: There is also a storage compartment at the rear for the minifigures weapons and 2 large ball-jointed engines that kids can tilt and rotate The buildable toy airshipship can be easily combined with other LEGO Marvel construction toys to recreate the awesome Avengers universe This Black Panther building toy for kids is a fun challenge for young superhero fans that can easily be reconfigured for awesome action This LEGO Marvel Black Panther Aircraft buildable toy makes a fab birthday or Christmas or gift for kids or Avengers fans aged 8 plus years old This set features a LEGO brick-built version of Shuris awesome Sunbird plane from Black Panther: Wakanda Forever plus 4 character minifigures Includes Shuri, Ironheart MK1, Nakia and Attuma Black Panther character LEGO minifigures, plus toy weapons: spear, battle rings and jetpack The Black Panther buildable toy airship is easily reconfigurable and features folding wings and 2 front-mounted stud shooters 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions McLaren Solus GT & McLaren F1 LM 2 Iconic Race Car Toys for Boys & Girls Hypercar Model Building Kit Collectible 2023 Set 76918
item.description: You can find LEGO Speed Champions McLaren Solus GT & McLaren F1 LM 2 Iconic Race Car Toys for Boys & Girls Hypercar Model Building Kit Collectible 2023 Set 76918 with a discount here: ℹ️: Kids can enjoy a rewarding build with the classic F1 LM and modern Solus GT replica model cars before proudly racing and displaying them The McLaren F1 LM race car toy features its distinctive papaya orange colour with a central driving seat and cooling ducts on both sides The Solus GT toy car model also includes details from the real version: white, black and orange colour scheme, prominent wheel arches and cockpit This double-pack LEGO Speed Champions set features 2 buildable replica toy car models; McLaren Solus GT and McLaren F1 LM to build and display The world of racing awaits sports car lovers with other LEGO Speed Champions sets like Ferrari 812 Competizione (76914) and Porsche 963 (76916) Perfect for setting up high-speed races, the model car building kit also includes 2 driver minifigures - 1 to drive each of the car toys 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 71411 Super Mario The Mighty Bowser 3D Model Building Kit Collectible Posable Character Figure with Battle Platform Memorabilia Gift Idea Set for Adults and Teens
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 71411 Super Mario The Mighty Bowser 3D Model Building Kit Collectible Posable Character Figure with Battle Platform Memorabilia Gift Idea Set for Adults and Teens here: ℹ️: Number of Pieces: 2,807 The model building kit also includes a hidden POW block with Action Tag that LEGO Super Mario characters (figures not included) can interact with The Super Mario 3D model building kit for adults and teens also has LEGO elements to authentically recreate the appearance of Bowsers spikes Fans can build a fantastic LEGO 3D model of The Mighty Bowser, to celebrate the iconic Super Mario boss, a large figure full of detail to display Starter Courses featuring LEGO Mario (71360), LEGO Luigi (71387) or LEGO Peach (71403) figures (sold separately) are required for interactive play Press a button under the shell to open the figures mouth, activate the fireball launcher and knock down the 2 towers from the battle platform This Super Mario collectible King of the Koopas figure has jointed arms, hands, legs, tail and rotating head and eyes to create different poses The Super Mario 3D model measures 12.

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter The Shrieking Shack & Whomping Willow 2 in 1 Wizarding World Toy with 6 Character Minifigures The Prisoner of Azkaban Set Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys 76407
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Harry Potter The Shrieking Shack & Whomping Willow 2 in 1 Wizarding World Toy with 6 Character Minifigures The Prisoner of Azkaban Set Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys 76407 here: ℹ️: This LEGO Harry Potter buildable toy is packed with features: Whomping Willow spins and its branches bend to strike and pick up the minifigures Makes a great Harry Potter gift idea: as a birthday, holiday or any occasion treat for kids, boys and girls aged 9 plus and fans of the Wizarding World adventures With this LEGO Harry Potter 2 in 1 set, kids can recreate 2 classic locations from the Movies: the Shrieking Shack and the Whomping Willow Accessories in the set include wands and a lantern, plus there are 4 random wizard cards to collect (out of 16 in total) Includes 6 LEGO Harry Potter minifigures: Harry, Hermione, Ron Weasley, Sirius Black, Peter Pettigrew and Remus Lupin who turns into a werewolf Kids can reenact scenes from Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban as they enter the Shrieking Shack through the secret passageway to save Ron The shrieking shack has boarded windows, a living room with a seat and a picture on the wall, plus a bedroom with a map, piano and a fireplace 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Adventures with Peach Starter Course Buildable Toy Game with Interactive Figure Yellow Toad & Lemmy Characters Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Collectible Toys 71403
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Super Mario Adventures with Peach Starter Course Buildable Toy Game with Interactive Figure Yellow Toad & Lemmy Characters Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Collectible Toys 71403 at the following link: ℹ️: Kids earn rewards from the Flying ? Block plus digital coins for helping LEGO Peach play on the swing and for interactions with the Yellow Toad LEGO Peach figure requires 2 x AAA batteries (not included) and connects via Bluetooth with LEGO Luigi or Mario (not included) for a 2-player game Kids feed LEGO Princess Peach the red toy fruit to trigger happy reactions and earn extra coins, or gift the fruit to the Yellow Toad figure The interactive Peach figure has a colour sensor, an LCD screen to display instant reactions and a speaker to play sounds from the video games The companion LEGO Super Mario app includes fun ways to play and more LEGO Super Mario Adventures with Peach Starter course includes interactive Princess Peach, Lemmy and Yellow Toad figures and a buildable toy course This Super Mario building toy features a Start Pipe, Goal Pole, swing, a Lava Bubble-launching challenge and combines with other LEGO Super Mario buildable toys 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 42156 Technic PEUGEOT 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar Iconic Racing Car Model Kit For Adults to Build 1:10 Scale Collectible Advanced Motorsport Set
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 42156 Technic PEUGEOT 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar Iconic Racing Car Model Kit For Adults to Build 1:10 Scale Collectible Advanced Motorsport Set at the following link: ℹ️: Number of Pieces: 1,775 Celebrate 100 years of Le Mans in 2023 with this authentic LEGO Technic PEUGEOT 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar model building kit for adults With this 1:10 scale LEGO race car set, youll enjoy a rewarding project, recreating details that reflect the latest innovations in auto racing The LEGO racing car includes LEGO Technic light elements that glow in the dark to capture the atmosphere from a real 24-hour race Add finishing touches to your model car with livery graphics and PEUGEOT and sponsor logos, then display the model as a tribute to your passion Build the LEGO race car hybrid system with a V6 piston engine, opening doors, steering and suspension and rear designed especially for this model Treat yourself or a car lover to iconic advanced LEGO sets for adults which offer a creative building project with a collectible hypercar model 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 42146 Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000 Set Build the Ultimate Remote Controlled Construction Vehicle with Control+ App Winch System and Luffing Jib Large Model for Adults Men Women
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 42146 Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000 Set Build the Ultimate Remote Controlled Construction Vehicle with Control+ App Winch System and Luffing Jib Large Model for Adults Men Women here: ℹ️: This large LEGO Technic construction set for adults provides a rewarding build with a detailed model to explore and makes a great gift for fans of mighty construction vehicles This model kit for adults to build features a large model crane with 2 smart hubs and 6 large motors - 12 LR AA batteries (not included) are required Number of Pieces: 2,883 Download the LEGO Technic CONTROL+ app for remote control to take charge of the model crane, plus see vehicle stats and try challenges Recreate one of the worlds most powerful cranes with this LEGO Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000, featuring LEGO Technic Control+ technology Explore tank steering, rotating turntable, luffing jib, winch, load-sensing features and 24 weight elements that provide over 0.

item.title: LEGO Star Wars AT-TE Walker Poseable Toy Revenge of the Sith Set Gift for Kids Boys & Girls with 3 212th Clone Troopers Dwarf Spider & Battle Droid Figures Father s Day Treat Gift Idea 75337
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars AT-TE Walker Poseable Toy Revenge of the Sith Set Gift for Kids Boys & Girls with 3 212th Clone Troopers Dwarf Spider & Battle Droid Figures Father s Day Treat Gift Idea 75337 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Star Wars set makes an exciting birthday gift for kids, boys and girls 9 plus years old, a Fathers Day gift for dad or a fun treat for fans of the Obi-Wan Kenobi series This LEGO Star Wars building toy features AT-TE Walker with space for up to 7 minifigures, 360-degree-rotating heavy blaster cannon and more The set also features a detachable minifigure cockpit and a seat for the 212th Clone Gunner, 6 blaster cannons, 2 thermal detonators and more Kids can use the extendable handle to lift and move the AT-TE, plus the model also has 2 detailed Clone Trooper cabins that open for easy play Includes 5 LEGO Star Wars minifigures: Commander Cody, a 212th Clone Gunner and 3 212th Clone Troopers for kids to recreate epic battles Kids can relive epic Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith battles and display this set in their room and show it off to their friends after the play The Star Wars buildable toy also includes 3 Battle Droid figures, a buildable Dwarf Spider Droid figure and loads of cool weapons 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions Porsche 963 Model Car Building Kit Racing Vehicle Toy for Kids 2023 Collectible Set with Driver Minifigure 76916
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Speed Champions Porsche 963 Model Car Building Kit Racing Vehicle Toy for Kids 2023 Collectible Set with Driver Minifigure 76916 here: ℹ️: This Porsche replica toy car features classic red, black and white livery and prominent wheel arches, inspired by 1980s Porsche racing cars A realistic LEGO reproduction with authentic features: a low bonnet, cockpit, rear wing and fin on the back are sure to delight race car fans The LEGO Builder app assists kids in building models using its intuitive digital tools to zoom, rotate and view their toy car model in 3D A collectible model car building kit complete with a LEGO race driver minifigure to be placed in the cockpit plus a helmet and switchable hair For even more high-speed action check out other LEGO Speed Champions sets, including Ferrari 812 Competizione (76914) and Pagani Utopia (76915) Fans of model cars and supercar enthusiasts can recreate the details of the Porsche 963 Le Mans Daytona Hybrid with this LEGO Speed Champions set A great birthday gift idea for kids, boys and girls aged 9+ or fans who love building race car toys - makes an eye-catching model to display with pride 🛒 Buy it now!
